heading: North American Wetlands Conservation Fund; availability of fines or forfeitures
label: 1474c North American Wetlands Conservation Fund; availability of fines or forfeitures
text: In fiscal year 1992 and thereafter, amounts received during the immediately preceding fiscal year under as penalties or fines or from forfeitures of property or collateral, to remain available until expended.section 707 of title 16
notes: Prior Similar ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in the following prior appropriation acts:, , .Pub. L. 102–381, title I106 Stat. 1381Oct. 5, 1992, , .Pub. L. 102–154, title I105 Stat. 995Nov. 13, 1991
